mapper.sql: id, provider_code, provider_sector_id, market_code, sector_name, top_name, tracking_symbol, enabled, last_refreshed_at, last_error, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_sector_watch (provider_code, provider_sector_id, market_code, sector_name, top_name, tracking_symbol, enabled) VALUES (#{providerCode}, #{providerSectorId}, #{marketCode}, #{sectorName}, #{topName}, #{trackingSymbol}, #{enabled})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM market_sector_watch WHERE provider_code = #{providerCode} AND provider_sector_id = #{providerSectorId}
mapper.update: UPDATE market_sector_watch SET enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE market_sector_watch SET last_refreshed_at = #{refreshedAt}, last_error = #{lastError} WHERE id = #{id}
